latest.title: Director/PDMR Shareholding - Replacement
latest.content:
30 Jun 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 2590K
tinyBuild, Inc.
30 June 2026
30 June 2026
tinyBuild, Inc
("tinyBuild" or the "Company")
PDMR Dealing
This announcement replaces RNS No. 2339K released on 29 June 2026 at 16:14 which quoted the incorrect currency in the purchase price.
tinyBuild, a premium video games publisher and developer with global operations, announces that it has been notified that Alex Nichiporchik, CEO, has purchased 200,000 ordinary shares in the Company at an average price of £0.093 per ordinary share.
Following the transaction, Alex Nichiporchik's beneficial interest in the Company amounts to 230,276,100 ordinary shares, representing 57.97% of the issued share capital.
The notification below, made in accordance with the requirements of the EU Market Abuse Regulation as it forms part of UK domestic law by virtue of the European Union (Withdrawal) Act 2018, provides further detail.
Notification and public disclosure of transactions by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and persons closely associated with them.

About tinyBuild:
Founded in 2013, tinyBuild (AIM: TBLD) is a global video games publisher and developer, with a catalogue of more than 100 premium titles across different genres. tinyBuild's strategy is to focus on its own intellectual property (IP) to build multi-game and multimedia franchises, in partnership with developers.
tinyBuild is headquartered in the USA with operations stretching across the Americas and Europe. The Group's broad geographical footprint enables the Company to source high-potential IP, access cost-effective development resources, and build a loyal customer base through its innovative grassroots marketing.
tinyBuild was admitted to AIM, a market by the London Stock Exchange, in March 2021.
For further information, visit:
www.tinybuildinvestors.com
.

tinyBuild, Inc.
18 June 2026
18 June 2026
tinyBuild, Inc
("tinyBuild" or the "Company")
Result of Annual General Meeting
tinyBuild, a premium video games publisher and developer with global operations, is pleased to announce that all resolutions were duly passed at the Company's AGM held earlier today.
All proxy votes received in relation to resolutions at the AGM will be available shortly on the Group's website:
https://www.tinybuildinvestors.com
.

company_30s.what_they_do: They design and publish sandbox‑style video games that let players build and share worlds. Their flagship title, SAND, is a multiplayer game that runs on PC and has a strong following on Steam.
company_30s.why_they_matter: Sandbox games are a fast‑growing niche in the gaming industry, with a loyal player base that spends heavily on in‑game content. The company’s titles tap into a community that values creativity and long‑term engagement, giving it a clear competitive edge over more linear games.
company_30s.current_state: The company is in the early revenue phase, having just launched SAND. It is spending heavily on servers and support, and the stock has fallen sharply after the launch, leaving it in a deep low relative to its historical peak.

rns_narrative: The company’s latest filings show it is grappling with server bugs that are hurting player reviews and sales momentum.
Governance updates reveal a change in shareholding and an upcoming AGM where the board will discuss the financial outlook and funding strategy.
Sales data for SAND is mixed: strong early numbers and top‑five placement on Steam, but negative reviews are rising as bugs persist.

crowd_tape.dominant_theme: Cautious excitement – fans are hopeful but wary of technical problems.
crowd_tape.bull_narrative: Some traders see the upcoming release of a new title, Kingmakers, as a catalyst for a revenue surge and a chance to wipe out the current low.
crowd_tape.bear_narrative: Others point to the server failures and declining reviews, warning that the company may struggle to keep players and could see the price slide further.
crowd_tape.sentiment_shift: Over the past week sentiment has stayed flat, with a slight uptick in optimism after the sales report, but overall engagement remains low.

whats_happening_now.attention_check: Google Trends for the company’s name is silent, indicating a lack of public buzz and a high potential for surprise when new information surfaces.

near_term_catalysts: Official fix for the SAND server bugs and a public announcement of the patch schedule.
Positive review turnaround as the patch is rolled out, boosting player confidence.
Launch of the new title Kingmakers, expected to bring a fresh stream of revenue.
A significant volume spike that breaks the current low and shows renewed investor interest.
expect_next.watch_for: Look for a clear break above the recent low with sustained volume, a positive earnings update, or a credible partnership announcement that could lift the game’s profile.
expect_next.timing_regime: The stock appears to be in the early stage of a recovery cycle after a deep crash. A tight price compression suggests a spring ready to snap if a catalyst materialises.

buy_vs_sell.bull_case: The share is trading far below its recent high, giving a built‑in upside if the game stabilises and the new title launches. Historically, deep crashes of this magnitude have produced large rebounds, especially when a new product or fix arrives. A 200% rise to the halfway point between the low and the previous peak is realistic if the bounce begins.
buy_vs_sell.bear_case: Persistent technical problems could erode the player base, keeping sales flat or declining. The worst scenario is a further slide to a lower low if the company fails to resolve bugs and the community loses interest.
buy_vs_sell.risk_reward: Potential upside of roughly 200% versus a downside limited to the current price. The reward is at least twice the risk, offering a favourable asymmetry.

playbook.if_bullish: Enter on a dip that follows a volume spike, ideally at a price near the recent low. Use a 30% stop‑loss below the entry to protect against a prolonged decline. Allocate about 5% of your portfolio to this position to keep risk manageable.
playbook.if_watching: Hold cash or a short position until you see either a clear support break above the low or a positive patch announcement. The trigger is a sustained price move above the low with at least 20% higher volume than the preceding week.
playbook.if_passing: There are no immediate delisting or bankruptcy risks, so the setup remains bullish as long as the company can resolve its technical issues and deliver the new title.

ai_insights.bottom_line: The stock sits at a deep crash bottom; if server problems are fixed and the new game releases, the mean‑reversion could deliver a two‑to‑one reward with a clear contrarian edge.

Historical data shows 2 rallies averaging 129% upside. Current position: +50.7%. Your edge comes from waiting for AI Engine confirmation instead of blind entry.
